verdict_scope: Only bridge-only dry-run and Chrome/CDP observe-only controlled smoke are allowed. Real upload/apply/install remains blocked.
allowed_smoke_scope: Chrome Dev/CDP observe-only marker/API smoke in isolated test profile
not_approved_for: real GitHub upload or apply route
clicking OpenPatch upload/archive buttons in live pages without owner action-time approval
Auto Continue live adapter install or blind waiting automation
treating GitHub-hosted assets as merge targets

top_risks.title: Generic .zip route confusion can send archives to apply route.
preflight can report go while readiness/config are no_go.
GitHub test upload handoff cannot inherit resolved route aliases.
Codex brief can recommend a bridge-smoke command even when action_now says fix blockers.
Auto Continue integration is still contract-level, not live verified.

required_designer_changes: Implement hard route classifier and asset_kind schema; unknown .zip must be unknown_blocked.
Make UI marker include asset_kind, route_decision, route_decision_reason, allowed_action, and not_approval=true for archive/review evidence.
Fix preflightBundle blocker logic to use readiness.go_no_go and config_lint.errors.
Fix githubUploadGate to use route.route_context aliases and reject ambiguous route_context.
Update v16 smokePlan stale V11/V15 references.
Make codexBrief next_command align with blockers.
Add regression fixtures for generic candidate zip, review result zip, exact changed-files.zip, webai-roundpack.zip, ambiguous routes, missing aliases, and bad config preflight.
Add a compact openpatch-agent-gateway-contract-v16.md with exact DOM markers, page events, button states, queue/latest/receipt fields, and failure states.
Add Auto Continue heartbeat contract and receipt-missing stop condition.
Document GitHub-hosted assets as hosted evidence only, not merge/install/approval.
tests_performed: Zip path scan found no unsafe absolute/../ paths and no symlinks; two executable bits on CLI .mjs files only.
Secret-pattern scan found no PAT/OpenAI/private-key/cookie assignment pattern values.
openpatch-main npm run check passed and manifest parsed.
node --check passed for local bridge, ledger CLI, and Auto Continue v9 adapter.
Controlled local bridge smoke passed in isolated root on port 17874 with dry_run_planned receipt and no token.
Adversarial classifier probe showed generic candidate/review .zip files default to patch_upload.
Bad-config probe showed preflight bridge-only false-go while readiness/config_lint were no_go.
decision_notes: Proceed to controlled smoke only if Codex does not click upload/archive buttons and does not use real PAT/browser profile/secrets. Route classifier and preflight false-go fixes are required before any GitHub test upload or broader automation.
